title: The impact of telemedicine enabled pre-hospital triage in acute stroke – a protocol for a mixed methods systematic review
author: McCartan, Deirdre
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This protocol describes the rationale and objectives of a mixed method systematic review (MMSR) that will assess the use of telemedicine enabled communication strategies that facilitate and support pre-hospital patient triage in acute stroke.
steps_raw: This protocol describes the rationale and objectives of a mixed method systematic review (MMSR) that will assess the use of telemedicine enabled communication strategies that facilitate and support pre-hospital patient triage in acute stroke.
keywords: Acute stroke, thrombolysis; thrombectomy; primary stroke centre (PSC); comprehensive stroke centre (CSC); prehospital; telemedicine; healthcare systems
